BEGIN_Q4624
F16= -r*s^5 + r^3*s^2 + 4*r*s^4 - 4*r^3*s + 3*r^2*s^2 - 10*r*s^3 + s^4 + 2*r^3 + 2*r^2*s + 6*r*s^2 - 2*r^2 - 3*r*s + r
TATE_M_RS_FACTOR= s * (r - 1)^2 * (r^2*s^3 - 8*r^2*s^2 - 2*r*s^3 + 16*r^2*s + 5*r*s^2 + s^3 - 20*r*s + 3*s^2 + 3*s + 1)
DISC_RS_FACTOR= r * s^2 * (r - 1)^3 * (r^2*s^3 - 8*r^2*s^2 - 2*r*s^3 + 16*r^2*s + 5*r*s^2 + s^3 - 20*r*s + 3*s^2 + 3*s + 1)
F16_XY= 0
B_XY= ((-x^7 - x^6 + x^5 - x^4 + x^3)/(x^2 + 2*x - 1))*y - x^6/(x^2 + 2*x - 1)
C_XY= ((-x^5 - 2*x^4 + x)/(x^3 + 3*x^2 + x - 1))*y + (-x^4 - x^3 - x^2 + x)/(x^3 + 3*x^2 + x - 1)
M_XY= ((-x^23 - 5*x^22 + x^21 + 39*x^20 + 46*x^19 - 51*x^18 - 109*x^17 - 63*x^16 + 5*x^15 + 155*x^14 + 154*x^13 - 21*x^12 - 92*x^11 - 124*x^10 - 31*x^9 + 50*x^8 + 54*x^7 + 19*x^6 - 12*x^5 - 13*x^4 - 4*x^3 + 2*x^2 + x)/(x^6 + 6*x^5 + 11*x^4 + 4*x^3 - 5*x^2 - 2*x + 1))*y + (-x^22 - 4*x^21 + 4*x^20 + 32*x^19 + 21*x^18 - 47*x^17 - 67*x^16 - 40*x^15 + 30*x^14 + 116*x^13 + 65*x^12 - 22*x^11 - 79*x^10 - 62*x^9 + 3*x^8 + 36*x^7 + 28*x^6 - 9*x^4 - 6*x^3 + x^2 + x)/(x^6 + 6*x^5 + 11*x^4 + 4*x^3 - 5*x^2 - 2*x + 1)
D_XY= ((-x^33 - 7*x^32 - 8*x^31 + 46*x^30 + 123*x^29 + 5*x^28 - 244*x^27 - 242*x^26 - 122*x^25 + 166*x^24 + 663*x^23 + 319*x^22 - 250*x^21 - 330*x^20 - 603*x^19 - 63*x^18 + 389*x^17 + 203*x^16 + 217*x^15 - 113*x^14 - 130*x^13 - 62*x^12 + 2*x^11 + 30*x^10 + 15*x^9 + x^8 - 3*x^7 - x^6)/(x^8 + 8*x^7 + 22*x^6 + 20*x^5 - 8*x^4 - 16*x^3 + 2*x^2 + 4*x - 1))*y + (-x^32 - 6*x^31 - 3*x^30 + 44*x^29 + 81*x^28 - 34*x^27 - 172*x^26 - 146*x^25 - 67*x^24 + 212*x^23 + 417*x^22 + 86*x^21 - 147*x^20 - 312*x^19 - 303*x^18 + 94*x^17 + 182*x^16 + 178*x^15 + 31*x^14 - 76*x^13 - 68*x^12 - 20*x^11 + 15*x^10 + 14*x^9 + 4*x^8 - 2*x^7 - x^6)/(x^8 + 8*x^7 + 22*x^6 + 20*x^5 - 8*x^4 - 16*x^3 + 2*x^2 + 4*x - 1)
D_XY_LIST= [(-x^32 - 6*x^31 - 3*x^30 + 44*x^29 + 81*x^28 - 34*x^27 - 172*x^26 - 146*x^25 - 67*x^24 + 212*x^23 + 417*x^22 + 86*x^21 - 147*x^20 - 312*x^19 - 303*x^18 + 94*x^17 + 182*x^16 + 178*x^15 + 31*x^14 - 76*x^13 - 68*x^12 - 20*x^11 + 15*x^10 + 14*x^9 + 4*x^8 - 2*x^7 - x^6)/(x^8 + 8*x^7 + 22*x^6 + 20*x^5 - 8*x^4 - 16*x^3 + 2*x^2 + 4*x - 1), (-x^33 - 7*x^32 - 8*x^31 + 46*x^30 + 123*x^29 + 5*x^28 - 244*x^27 - 242*x^26 - 122*x^25 + 166*x^24 + 663*x^23 + 319*x^22 - 250*x^21 - 330*x^20 - 603*x^19 - 63*x^18 + 389*x^17 + 203*x^16 + 217*x^15 - 113*x^14 - 130*x^13 - 62*x^12 + 2*x^11 + 30*x^10 + 15*x^9 + x^8 - 3*x^7 - x^6)/(x^8 + 8*x^7 + 22*x^6 + 20*x^5 - 8*x^4 - 16*x^3 + 2*x^2 + 4*x - 1)]
R_UV= ((-U^2 - 4*U + 1)/(U^5 + 5*U^4 + 8*U^3 + 4*U^2 - U - 1))*V + (3*U^2 + 1)/(U^3 + 3*U^2 + 3*U + 1)
S_UV= (-1/(U^2 + 2*U + 1))*V + (U^2 + 1)/(U^2 + 2*U + 1)
B_UV= ((3*U^7 - U^6 - 17*U^5 + 35*U^4 - 39*U^3 + 29*U^2 - 11*U + 1)/(U^10 + 10*U^9 + 43*U^8 + 104*U^7 + 154*U^6 + 140*U^5 + 70*U^4 + 8*U^3 - 11*U^2 - 6*U - 1))*V + (-U^10 - 5*U^9 + 10*U^8 + 10*U^7 - 40*U^6 + 64*U^5 - 74*U^4 + 54*U^3 - 23*U^2 + 5*U)/(U^10 + 10*U^9 + 43*U^8 + 104*U^7 + 154*U^6 + 140*U^5 + 70*U^4 + 8*U^3 - 11*U^2 - 6*U - 1)
C_UV= ((U^5 + U^4 - 2*U^3 + 6*U^2 - 7*U + 1)/(U^7 + 7*U^6 + 19*U^5 + 25*U^4 + 15*U^3 + U^2 - 3*U - 1))*V + (4*U^4 - 4*U^3 + 4*U^2 - 4*U)/(U^5 + 5*U^4 + 10*U^3 + 10*U^2 + 5*U + 1)
M_UV= ((-3*U^23 - 13*U^22 + 112*U^21 + 444*U^20 - 801*U^19 - 1099*U^18 + 7792*U^17 - 9280*U^16 - 28862*U^15 + 39150*U^14 - 86960*U^13 - 59816*U^12 + 166558*U^11 - 320582*U^10 + 371664*U^9 - 198496*U^8 + 124433*U^7 + 20399*U^6 - 29440*U^5 + 5004*U^4 - 205*U^3 + U^2)/(U^24 + 24*U^23 + 272*U^22 + 1936*U^21 + 9706*U^20 + 36424*U^19 + 106096*U^18 + 245328*U^17 + 456399*U^16 + 687344*U^15 + 837216*U^14 + 816544*U^13 + 621452*U^12 + 346256*U^11 + 113696*U^10 - 10336*U^9 - 39729*U^8 - 25992*U^7 - 8816*U^6 - 816*U^5 + 746*U^4 + 424*U^3 + 112*U^2 + 16*U + 1))*V + (U^26 + 15*U^25 + 33*U^24 - 165*U^23 + 27*U^22 + 2789*U^21 - 469*U^20 - 11495*U^19 + 13594*U^18 - 17658*U^17 - 103462*U^16 + 75070*U^15 - 150330*U^14 - 147910*U^13 + 408166*U^12 - 579870*U^11 + 713909*U^10 - 377189*U^9 + 221269*U^8 - 7849*U^7 - 52913*U^6 + 15665*U^5 - 1249*U^4 + 21*U^3)/(U^24 + 24*U^23 + 272*U^22 + 1936*U^21 + 9706*U^20 + 36424*U^19 + 106096*U^18 + 245328*U^17 + 456399*U^16 + 687344*U^15 + 837216*U^14 + 816544*U^13 + 621452*U^12 + 346256*U^11 + 113696*U^10 - 10336*U^9 - 39729*U^8 - 25992*U^7 - 8816*U^6 - 816*U^5 + 746*U^4 + 424*U^3 + 112*U^2 + 16*U + 1)
D_UV= ((6*U^33 + 72*U^32 - 10*U^31 - 1912*U^30 - 138*U^29 + 22736*U^28 - 22250*U^27 - 131728*U^26 + 345406*U^25 + 62744*U^24 - 1619058*U^23 + 3004504*U^22 - 641138*U^21 - 8246272*U^20 + 19649998*U^19 - 21191264*U^18 - 178862*U^17 + 46035704*U^16 - 99426590*U^15 + 134057656*U^14 - 133151262*U^13 + 100047376*U^12 - 54942334*U^11 + 19016176*U^10 - 651542*U^9 - 3702104*U^8 + 2142490*U^7 - 535704*U^6 + 59802*U^5 - 2528*U^4 + 26*U^3)/(U^34 + 34*U^33 + 555*U^32 + 5792*U^31 + 43412*U^30 + 248856*U^29 + 1134356*U^28 + 4219856*U^27 + 13044888*U^26 + 33939984*U^25 + 74979840*U^24 + 141448320*U^23 + 228501780*U^22 + 316050360*U^21 + 372893940*U^20 + 371998320*U^19 + 308281650*U^18 + 204594660*U^17 + 99177150*U^16 + 23504160*U^15 - 12498660*U^14 - 18676920*U^13 - 11858340*U^12 - 4314960*U^11 - 390000*U^10 + 589056*U^9 + 416664*U^8 + 141760*U^7 + 19132*U^6 - 6168*U^5 - 4324*U^4 - 1264*U^3 - 219*U^2 - 22*U - 1))*V + (-U^36 - 29*U^35 - 152*U^34 + 488*U^33 + 3356*U^32 - 7260*U^31 - 30336*U^30 + 89440*U^29 + 81200*U^28 - 595640*U^27 + 682872*U^26 + 1186296*U^25 - 4974004*U^24 + 6181620*U^23 + 2418672*U^22 - 23114800*U^21 + 43817510*U^20 - 39151994*U^19 - 11398056*U^18 + 103743192*U^17 - 203005420*U^16 + 262132140*U^15 - 255244640*U^14 + 192192576*U^13 - 108641048*U^12 + 41249232*U^11 - 5077048*U^10 - 5647288*U^9 + 4282628*U^8 - 1372612*U^7 + 213232*U^6 - 14448*U^5 + 323*U^4 - U^3)/(U^34 + 34*U^33 + 555*U^32 + 5792*U^31 + 43412*U^30 + 248856*U^29 + 1134356*U^28 + 4219856*U^27 + 13044888*U^26 + 33939984*U^25 + 74979840*U^24 + 141448320*U^23 + 228501780*U^22 + 316050360*U^21 + 372893940*U^20 + 371998320*U^19 + 308281650*U^18 + 204594660*U^17 + 99177150*U^16 + 23504160*U^15 - 12498660*U^14 - 18676920*U^13 - 11858340*U^12 - 4314960*U^11 - 390000*U^10 + 589056*U^9 + 416664*U^8 + 141760*U^7 + 19132*U^6 - 6168*U^5 - 4324*U^4 - 1264*U^3 - 219*U^2 - 22*U - 1)
D_UV_LIST= [(-U^36 - 29*U^35 - 152*U^34 + 488*U^33 + 3356*U^32 - 7260*U^31 - 30336*U^30 + 89440*U^29 + 81200*U^28 - 595640*U^27 + 682872*U^26 + 1186296*U^25 - 4974004*U^24 + 6181620*U^23 + 2418672*U^22 - 23114800*U^21 + 43817510*U^20 - 39151994*U^19 - 11398056*U^18 + 103743192*U^17 - 203005420*U^16 + 262132140*U^15 - 255244640*U^14 + 192192576*U^13 - 108641048*U^12 + 41249232*U^11 - 5077048*U^10 - 5647288*U^9 + 4282628*U^8 - 1372612*U^7 + 213232*U^6 - 14448*U^5 + 323*U^4 - U^3)/(U^34 + 34*U^33 + 555*U^32 + 5792*U^31 + 43412*U^30 + 248856*U^29 + 1134356*U^28 + 4219856*U^27 + 13044888*U^26 + 33939984*U^25 + 74979840*U^24 + 141448320*U^23 + 228501780*U^22 + 316050360*U^21 + 372893940*U^20 + 371998320*U^19 + 308281650*U^18 + 204594660*U^17 + 99177150*U^16 + 23504160*U^15 - 12498660*U^14 - 18676920*U^13 - 11858340*U^12 - 4314960*U^11 - 390000*U^10 + 589056*U^9 + 416664*U^8 + 141760*U^7 + 19132*U^6 - 6168*U^5 - 4324*U^4 - 1264*U^3 - 219*U^2 - 22*U - 1), (6*U^33 + 72*U^32 - 10*U^31 - 1912*U^30 - 138*U^29 + 22736*U^28 - 22250*U^27 - 131728*U^26 + 345406*U^25 + 62744*U^24 - 1619058*U^23 + 3004504*U^22 - 641138*U^21 - 8246272*U^20 + 19649998*U^19 - 21191264*U^18 - 178862*U^17 + 46035704*U^16 - 99426590*U^15 + 134057656*U^14 - 133151262*U^13 + 100047376*U^12 - 54942334*U^11 + 19016176*U^10 - 651542*U^9 - 3702104*U^8 + 2142490*U^7 - 535704*U^6 + 59802*U^5 - 2528*U^4 + 26*U^3)/(U^34 + 34*U^33 + 555*U^32 + 5792*U^31 + 43412*U^30 + 248856*U^29 + 1134356*U^28 + 4219856*U^27 + 13044888*U^26 + 33939984*U^25 + 74979840*U^24 + 141448320*U^23 + 228501780*U^22 + 316050360*U^21 + 372893940*U^20 + 371998320*U^19 + 308281650*U^18 + 204594660*U^17 + 99177150*U^16 + 23504160*U^15 - 12498660*U^14 - 18676920*U^13 - 11858340*U^12 - 4314960*U^11 - 390000*U^10 + 589056*U^9 + 416664*U^8 + 141760*U^7 + 19132*U^6 - 6168*U^5 - 4324*U^4 - 1264*U^3 - 219*U^2 - 22*U - 1)]
DUV COEFF 0 NUM_FACTOR (-1) * U^3 * (U - 1)^6 * (U^2 - 2*U - 1) * (U^2 + 1) * (U^23 + 37*U^22 + 421*U^21 + 1933*U^20 + 2599*U^19 - 4629*U^18 - 1957*U^17 + 51323*U^16 + 70410*U^15 + 64594*U^14 + 378578*U^13 + 466114*U^12 + 291822*U^11 + 1219222*U^10 + 538870*U^9 + 180182*U^8 + 1573733*U^7 - 1267079*U^6 + 1179897*U^5 - 698527*U^4 + 159611*U^3 - 13169*U^2 + 319*U - 1) DEN_FACTOR (U + 1)^28 * (U^2 + 2*U - 1)^3
DUV COEFF 1 NUM_FACTOR (6) * U^3 * (U - 1)^6 * (U^2 - 2*U - 1) * (U^2 + 1) * (U^10 + 6*U^9 - 5/3*U^8 - 128/3*U^7 - 22*U^6 - 36*U^5 - 506/3*U^4 + 48*U^3 - 449/3*U^2 + 74/3*U - 1/3) * (U^10 + 14*U^9 + 49*U^8 + 16*U^7 - 38*U^6 + 316*U^5 + 322*U^4 - 96*U^3 + 677*U^2 - 250*U + 13) DEN_FACTOR (U + 1)^28 * (U^2 + 2*U - 1)^3
DUV NORM_FACTOR (U + 1)^-14 * U^6 * (U - 1)^16 * (U^2 + 2*U - 1)^-6 * (U^2 - 2*U - 1)^2 * (U^2 + 1)^2
BUV COEFF 0 NUM_FACTOR (-1) * U * (U - 1)^3 * (U^2 + 1) * (U^4 + 8*U^3 + 10*U^2 - 8*U + 5) DEN_FACTOR (U + 1)^8 * (U^2 + 2*U - 1)
BUV COEFF 1 NUM_FACTOR (3) * (U - 1)^3 * (U^4 + 8/3*U^3 - 2/3*U^2 + 8/3*U - 1/3) DEN_FACTOR (U + 1)^8 * (U^2 + 2*U - 1)
BUV NORM_FACTOR (U + 1)^-7 * U * (U - 1)^8 * (U^2 + 2*U - 1)^-2 * (U^2 + 1)
MUV COEFF 0 NUM_FACTOR (U - 1) * U^3 * (U^2 - 2*U - 1) * (U^2 + 1) * (U^2 + 4*U - 1) * (U^3 + U^2 - U + 7) * (U^13 + 13*U^12 + 18*U^11 - 62*U^10 + 279*U^9 + 1331*U^8 + 924*U^7 + 1884*U^6 + 3551*U^5 - 1437*U^4 + 3250*U^3 - 1726*U^2 + 169*U - 3) DEN_FACTOR (U + 1)^20 * (U^2 + 2*U - 1)^2
MUV COEFF 1 NUM_FACTOR (-3) * (U - 1) * U^2 * (U^2 - 2*U - 1) * (U^5 - 3*U^4 - 14*U^3 + 2*U^2 - 19*U + 1) * (U^13 + 31/3*U^12 + 86/3*U^11 + 70/3*U^10 + 389/3*U^9 + 1265/3*U^8 + 220*U^7 + 540*U^6 + 3485/3*U^5 - 1327/3*U^4 + 3382/3*U^3 - 1658/3*U^2 + 187/3*U - 1/3) DEN_FACTOR (U + 1)^20 * (U^2 + 2*U - 1)^2
MUV NORM_FACTOR (U + 1)^-7 * U^5 * (U - 1)^8 * (U^2 + 2*U - 1)^-4 * (U^2 + 1) * (U^2 - 2*U - 1)^2
END_Q4624
